notes: Non-skippable in-stream ads play before, during, or after other videos. Users do not have the option to skip the ad. The source references max 15-20 seconds in the format comparison table and 'up to 30 seconds' in the reservation ad format description; the campaign subtype 'Non-skippable reach' specifies '15-second non-skippable in-stream ads'. Max duration of 15s used based on the most specific reference. Available via auction (tCPM bidding) and reservation buying types.
